positive: A vibrant and mystical celestial forest scene, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna nestled among dramatic, gnarled root systems. The composition should be centrally balanced and highly symmetrical, utilizing negative space effectively. Dominant colors are deep indigo, emerald green, and vibrant cyan, accented by glowing gold highlights. The style must emulate intricate, highly detailed linocut woodblock printing mixed with modern psychedelic vector art. Focus on clean silhouettes, strong graphical contrast, and a radial symmetry composition suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Dramatic rim lighting illuminates the main elements against a deep void background. Minimalist composition, maximal visual impact, perfect for T-shirt screen printing.
negative: blurry, low quality, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, messy, cluttered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, signature, copyright, cartoon, photorealistic
